## What changed

Brief description of the change and which file(s) it affects.

## Why

What problem does this solve, or what evidence supports the change?

## Checklist

- [ ] The honest bump is preserved
- [ ] The Audience Agent remains a real subagent (not collapsed into a role-play)
- [ ] The misconception-first structure is intact
- [ ] `plugin.json` version bumped appropriately (patch / minor / major)
- [ ] Tested with at least one concept at one audience level
